zh.Ipsden, South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire,: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾素斯 奧可福爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Paston於大約1378年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可柏斯頓時，他的父親Clement de Paston II24歲，母親Beatrice de Somerton25歲。他於1418年3月24日與Agnes Berry在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1444年8月14日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Ipsden, South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire,: 英国英格兰奧可福爾素斯 奧可福爾

nameMeanings.name: Paston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name, chiefly from Paston in Norfolk, probably derived from an Old English personal name Pæcci (genitive Pæcces) or Old English pæsc(e) (the source of northern English dialect pash ‘puddle’) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

English (West Midlands): sometimes a variant of Patstone, a habitational name chiefly from the lost Padston(e) in Bromsgrove (Worcestershire), and occasionally from Padson in Inwardleigh (Devon). The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Padda (genitive Paddes) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Devon placename is uncertain due to a lack of medieval forms, though an early spelling suggests the final element is Old English dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Paston was born about 1378, in Paston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Clement de Paston II, was 24 and his mother, Beatrice de Somerton, was 25. He married Agnes Berry on 24 March 1418, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died about 14 August 1444, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Paston est né environ 1378, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Clement de Paston II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Somerton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Berry le 24 mars 1418, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé environ 14 août 1444, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Paston um 1378 in Paston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Clement de Paston II 24 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Somerton 25. Er hat am 24. März 1418 in Paston, Norfolk, England Agnes Berry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb um 14. August 1444 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Paston è nato il circa 1378 nel Paston, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Clement de Paston II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Somerton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Berry il 24 marzo 1418, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 14 agosto 1444, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pastonが約1378年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父Clement de Paston IIは24歳，母Beatrice de Somertonは25歳であった。1418年3月24日にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでAgnes Berryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は約1444年8月14日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Paston(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Clement de Paston II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Somerton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1418년 3월 24일 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 Agnes Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1444년 8월 14일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Paston nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Clement de Paston II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Somerton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Berry em 24 de março de 1418, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 14 de agosto de 1444, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Paston родился около 1378 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Clement de Paston II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Somerton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Berry 24 марта 1418 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер около 14 августа 1444 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Agnes Berry el 24 de marzo de 1418, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 14 de agosto de 1444, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
